positive.stdout:

cnf(u12,axiom,
    ~on_top_10_list(X0) | made_by_japanese_company(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    legend_of_zelda != fifa_22).

    on_top_10_list(legend_of_zelda)).

    sells_over_million(legend_of_zelda)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~made_by_japanese_company(fifa_22)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    made_by_japanese_company(legend_of_zelda)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
